zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前BNB/美元处于窄幅震荡格局，价格围绕603美元反复整理，多空力量较为均衡，但低位承接仍保持一定韧性，短线未形成明确方向选择。

技术指标方面，MACD维持在零轴上方且数值为正，显示短期动能仍偏多，但价格已略低于20日均线604.59，反映上方存在一定压制。

支撑位关注602.30附近低点及600整数关口，若跌破或引发短线回踩；阻力位位于604.6及605上方，突破后有望打开上行空间。

操作上建议以区间思路为主，未有效突破605前不宜追多，可在602附近低吸博弈反弹，同时设置600下方止损控制风险严格风控执行。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 603, with price action compressed between 602.33 and 604.23 over the last 24 hours. Despite a marginal daily gain of 0.15%, momentum remains largely neutral. The market structure suggests indecision after a recent impulse, with volatility contracting. Overall trend is sideways, though buyers continue to defend lower bounds, preventing any meaningful bearish breakdown.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but slightly constructive picture. MACD at 1.056790 remains positive, indicating that short-term bullish momentum is still present, although the lack of a visible signal line limits confirmation strength. With RSI unavailable, price behavior suggests mid-range equilibrium. The SMA(20) at 604.58850 acts as immediate overhead resistance, with price currently trading just below it, signaling mild rejection pressure.

Key support and resistance levels remain tightly compressed due to low volatility. Immediate support is located at 602.33, the recent intraday low, followed by a psychological floor near 600. On the upside, resistance is seen at 604.23, with a stronger barrier at 604.59 aligned with the 20-day SMA. A decisive break beyond either boundary may trigger expansion. This compression typically precedes a volatility spike in either direction.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy until a confirmed breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near 602 support with tight stops below 600, targeting the SMA resistance zone around 604.6. Alternatively, rejection at resistance could justify short positions toward lower boundary levels. A breakout above 604.6 would shift bias bullish, while a breakdown below 602 would open deeper downside toward 600 and below.
